org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.SerializerWriter

Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.

XML Marshalling Support

  • Uses of SerializerWriter in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer that return SerializerWriter
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.append(char c)
     
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.append(char[] value)
    Appends the specified characters to this writer.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.append(int indent, char value)
    Writes an indent (if the useWhitespace setting is enabled), followed by text.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.append(int indent, String value)
    Writes an indent (if the useWhitespace setting is enabled), followed by text.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.append(Object value)
    Writes the specified text to the writer if it isn't null.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.append(String value)
    Writes the specified text to the writer if it isn't null.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.appendIf(boolean flag, char value)
    Writes the specified text to the writer if b is true.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.appendIf(boolean flag, String value)
    Writes the specified text to the writer if b is true.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.appendln(int indent, String value)
    Writes an indent (if the useWhitespace setting is enabled), followed by text, followed by a newline (if the useWhitespace setting is enabled).
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.appendln(String value)
    Writes the specified text followed by a newline (if the useWhitespace setting is enabled).
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.appendUri(Object value)
    Appends the specified object as a URI.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.cr(int depth)
    Performs a carriage return.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.cre(int depth)
    Performs a carriage return at the end of a line.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.i(int indent)
    Writes an indent to the writer if the useWhitespace setting is enabled.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.ie(int indent)
    Writes an end-of-line indent to the writer if the useWhitespace setting is enabled.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.nl(int indent)
    Writes a newline to the writer if the useWhitespace setting is enabled.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.nlIf(boolean flag, int indent)
    Writes a newline to the writer if the useWhitespace setting is enabled and the boolean flag is true.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.q()
    Adds the quote character specified by the quoteChar setting to the output.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.s()
    Adds a whitespace character to the output if the useWhitespace setting is enabled.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.sIf(boolean flag)
    Writes a space if the boolean expression is true and useWhitespace is false.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.w(char value)
    Writes the specified character to the writer.
    SerializerWriter
    SerializerWriter.w(String value)
    Writes the specified string to the writer.
